hero.bio: I'm Thao Ngan — Fullstack developer with 10+ months of production experience building Atlassian Forge apps. Passionate about performance-heavy products and AI integration.

work.tagline: → Atlassian Forge apps · PM, HR, Productivity

projects.title: PlanCore
projects.description: Sole developer of the Gantt Chart module (FE + BE) from scratch for a large-scale project management app. Built a high-performance timeline view handling 5,000+ issues with drag-and-drop, inline editing, duplicate, and multi-level task hierarchy.

projects.title: HumanCore
projects.description: Developed Employee Directory, Org Chart/Hierarchy, and Job Assignment features for an HR management app. First project with significant backend involvement on the Atlassian Forge platform.

projects.title: ProductGo
projects.description: Extended and stabilized a Custom Kanban feature in a 5–6 year-old User Story Mapping codebase. Implemented onboarding tour and configured Advanced App monetization on Atlassian Marketplace — first in the company to do so.

academy.title: MemoryMap
academy.description: A cross-platform mobile app that pins your photos to the exact spot they happened — save memories on a map, share a real-time Duo Map with a partner, and capture moments offline.
overview: MemoryMap is a cross-platform iOS & Android app built around one idea — "save memories where they actually happened, not in an endless feed." You snap a photo, it's automatically geo-tagged, and it appears on a map as a pin at the exact spot it happened.

Beyond a personal map, two people can share a real-time Duo Map — Locket-style — joining via an invite code and seeing each other's memories appear live. The app is offline-first: capture a memory with no signal and it queues as a draft, then auto-syncs when you're back online.

features.title: Geo-tagged memories
features.body: Snap a photo, auto-tag it with GPS and a reverse-geocoded place name, and pin it to the map at the exact spot.

features.title: Real-time Duo Map
features.body: Share a map with a partner via invite code — Supabase Realtime presence shows live updates and online status, with two-color pins and All/Mine/Partner filters.

features.title: Offline-first capture
features.body: An offline outbox queues memory drafts in AsyncStorage and auto-uploads them via NetInfo when the connection returns.

features.title: Custom map & clustering
features.body: Full-screen map with a warm custom style, thumbnail memory pins, and proximity clustering built from scratch — no library.

features.title: Memory Journal
features.body: A calendar view that groups memories by day straight from the cache, with per-day stats and a story viewer.

features.title: Reactions & proximity reminders
features.body: Emoji reactions on memories, plus push notifications — anniversary reminders and a background task that nudges you when you walk near a past memory.

academy.contributions: Designed and built the whole app solo — from the Supabase schema (profiles, memories, duo maps, reactions, push tokens) with row-level security and security-definer RPCs, to the React Native client. Implemented the offline outbox pattern, proximity clustering and custom map markers from scratch, real-time Duo Map presence over WebSocket, reverse geocoding, the calendar-based Memory Journal, share-as-card, and a background location task with anniversary push notifications via a scheduled Supabase Edge Function.

academy.title: ProLearning
academy.description: AI-powered learning platform that turns notes, files, and URLs into flashcards, exams, and study plans — then nudges you back when you get things wrong. My senior thesis.
academy.stack: REACT · TS · RN · SPRING · PG · GEMINI
overview: An intelligent learning platform that helps users retain knowledge — not just access it. In the age of AI, information is easier to find than ever, but harder to truly remember. ProLearning bridges that gap by combining AI-generated study materials with structured review cycles, keeping knowledge active and long-term.

A full-stack web & mobile application where users organize learning content into Sets, each containing Notes, Flashcards, and Exams. The AI layer generates flashcards and exams from user notes, uploaded files, or web URLs — and tracks what users get wrong to surface it again later.

features.title: AI generation
features.body: Generate flashcards & exams from notes, uploaded files, or web URLs via Gemini.

features.title: Spaced review
features.body: Weekly review notifications surface questions users previously got wrong.

features.title: Roadmap generator
features.body: AI builds a full study plan — notes, flashcards, exams, and daily to-dos — from a single goal like "Master React in 1 month".

features.title: Goal tracking
features.body: Track learning goals with linked daily and weekly tasks.

features.title: Pomodoro timer
features.body: Built-in focused study sessions wired to the active set.

academy.contributions: Owned the frontend architecture and led a full UI redesign mid-project to improve consistency and user experience. On the backend (Java Spring Boot), built and integrated several core modules including To-do, Goal tracking, Activity Log, and User Management, alongside various supporting features.

footer.right: Thank you for visiting my portfolio!
